summary: Iteration 26: CEO Dashboard + Pulse Bar Search Bug Fix — ALL TESTS PASS. Full CEO Dashboard with 6 sections working (Company Health KPIs, Revenue vs Profit chart, Targets/Goals Panel, Companies table, Module Adoption, Risk Alerts, Growth Pipeline). Pulse Bar search with confirmation modal working (search by tab number, #prefix, guest name). All regressions verified: Table page 8 demo tables, Owner Dashboard view switcher, Manager guests sorted by spend.

minor.note: Console warning in Companies section about tr/span nesting in tbody (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)

issues: Minor React hydration warning about tr/span nesting in table tbody (cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality)

login.description: Login with teste@teste.com / 12345 works, redirects to /venue/home

pulse_bar_search_tab_number.description: API GET /api/pulse/bar/search?venue_id=X&q=201 finds tab by number, confirmation modal opens

pulse_bar_search_hash_prefix.description: API GET /api/pulse/bar/search?venue_id=X&q=%23201 finds tab with # prefix

pulse_bar_search_guest_name.description: API GET /api/pulse/bar/search?venue_id=X&q=Maria finds tab by guest name 'Maria Santos'

pulse_bar_confirmation_modal.description: BarGuestConfirmModal shows photo/name/tab#, confirm button works and displays current guest card

ceo_module_navigation.description: CEO Dashboard accessible via Modules > CEO menu, navigates to /ceo

ceo_health_kpis.description: Company Health shows 8 KPI cards (MRR, Gross Revenue, Net Profit, Active Companies, Active Venues, Churn Rate, Activation Rate, Avg Rev/Company) with color status dots

ceo_revenue_chart.description: Revenue & Profit section loads with week/month/year period switcher and bar chart visualization

ceo_targets_panel.description: Targets panel in left sidebar shows weekly/monthly/annual with progress bars and pace needed

ceo_edit_targets.description: Edit targets button opens form, save updates targets via POST /api/ceo/targets

ceo_companies_section.description: Companies section shows table with company/venues/status/MRR/modules

ceo_module_adoption.description: Module Adoption section shows adoption % per module (pulse, tap, table, kds) with progress bars

ceo_risk_alerts.description: Risk & Alerts section shows alerts sorted by severity (critical first, then warning)

ceo_growth_pipeline.description: Growth Pipeline section shows funnel visualization with 6 stages (leads, paid, activated, active, at_risk, cancelled)

api_ceo_health.description: API GET /api/ceo/health returns KPIs object with all expected fields

api_ceo_targets.description: API GET /api/ceo/targets returns targets with progress, pace_needed

api_ceo_companies.description: API GET /api/ceo/companies returns companies list with venues, MRR, modules

api_ceo_modules.description: API GET /api/ceo/modules returns module adoption data (pulse, tap, table, kds)

api_ceo_alerts.description: API GET /api/ceo/alerts returns risk alerts sorted by severity

api_ceo_pipeline.description: API GET /api/ceo/pipeline returns growth pipeline with 6 stages

regression_table_8_tables.description: Table page shows 8 demo tables (3 occupied: Table #2 Maria Santos, #3 Ricardo Almeida, #7 Fernando VIP; 5 available)

regression_table_server_selection.description: Mandatory server selection still works — Server Selector visible in header

regression_owner_view_switcher.description: Owner Dashboard view switcher works (Business Overview, By Venue, By Event)

regression_manager_guests_sorted.description: Manager Dashboard guests sorted by highest spender (John Smith VIP $450, Maria Lopez $180, Kevin Brown $90, etc.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All CEO Dashboard sections, Pulse Bar search, and regressions verified via Playwright)

ceo_dashboard_sections.targets_panel: Weekly/Monthly/Annual goals with progress bars and pace needed
ceo_dashboard_sections.module_adoption: 4 module cards (pulse, tap, table, kds) with adoption %

pulse_bar_search_fix.confirmation_modal: Shows photo/name/tab#, has Confirm and Cancel buttons
pulse_bar_search_fix.guest_selection: After confirm, displays current guest card with 'Confirmed' badge

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26: CEO Dashboard and Pulse Bar search bug fix PASSED. CEO Dashboard has 6 sections accessible via left sidebar nav tabs. Pulse Bar page now has search input that calls /api/pulse/bar/search and opens BarGuestConfirmModal. All existing features preserved: Table page 8 demo tables, Owner Dashboard view switcher, Manager guests sorted by spend. Non-regression rule honored — nothing removed or altered.
